summary: This is a brief announcement post where Joel Spolsky mentions he will be speaking at the Future of Web Apps conference in Miami in February 2009. He invites readers to suggest topics for his talk via email. The post contains no substantive argument or analysis, serving purely as a event notification to his audience.
key_points: Joel was invited to speak at the Future of Web Apps (FOWA) conference in Miami
He crowdsourced talk topic ideas from his blog readers
key_insight: A simple conference announcement with no substantive technical or business content.
